task.name: Stroop Color-Word Task (RDoC)
reference_literature: Stroop (1935) - Studies of interference in serial verbal reactions
MacLeod (1991) - Half a century of research on the Stroop effect: An integrative review
Eisenberg et al. (2019) - Uncovering the structure of self-regulation through data-driven ontology discovery

stimuli.description: Color word displayed in matching ink color (e.g., 'red' in red ink)

detection.selector: (function(){ var el = document.querySelector('#jspsych-html-keyboard-response-stimulus .stroop-stim'); if(!el) return false; var word = el.textContent.trim().toLowerCase(); var style = el.style.color; var colorMap = {'rgb(255, 112, 112)':'red','rgb(112, 112, 255)':'blue','rgb(112, 255, 112)':'green','#ff7070':'red','#7070ff':'blue','#70ff70':'green'}; var inkColor = colorMap[style] || ''; return word === inkColor; })()

response.response_key_js: (function(){ var el = document.querySelector('#jspsych-html-keyboard-response-stimulus .stroop-stim'); if(!el) return null; var style = el.style.color; var colorMap = {'rgb(255, 112, 112)':'#FF7070','rgb(112, 112, 255)':'#7070FF','rgb(112, 255, 112)':'#70FF70','#ff7070':'#FF7070','#7070ff':'#7070FF','#70ff70':'#70FF70'}; var hex = colorMap[style]; var pr = possibleResponses; if(hex==='#FF7070') return pr[0][1]; if(hex==='#7070FF') return pr[1][1]; if(hex==='#70FF70') return pr[2][1]; return null; })()

stimuli.description: Color word displayed in non-matching ink color (e.g., 'red' in blue ink)

detection.selector: (function(){ var el = document.querySelector('#jspsych-html-keyboard-response-stimulus .stroop-stim'); if(!el) return false; var word = el.textContent.trim().toLowerCase(); var style = el.style.color; var colorMap = {'rgb(255, 112, 112)':'red','rgb(112, 112, 255)':'blue','rgb(112, 255, 112)':'green','#ff7070':'red','#7070ff':'blue','#70ff70':'green'}; var inkColor = colorMap[style] || ''; return inkColor !== '' && word !== inkColor; })()

response.response_key_js: (function(){ var el = document.querySelector('#jspsych-html-keyboard-response-stimulus .stroop-stim'); if(!el) return null; var style = el.style.color; var colorMap = {'rgb(255, 112, 112)':'#FF7070','rgb(112, 112, 255)':'#7070FF','rgb(112, 255, 112)':'#70FF70','#ff7070':'#FF7070','#7070ff':'#7070FF','#70ff70':'#70FF70'}; var hex = colorMap[style]; var pr = possibleResponses; if(hex==='#FF7070') return pr[0][1]; if(hex==='#7070FF') return pr[1][1]; if(hex==='#70FF70') return pr[2][1]; return null; })()

task_specific.counterbalancing: Key-color mapping is determined by group_index (window.efVars.group_index), which selects from 5 possible response mappings for red/blue/green to comma/period/slash keys.

phase_detection.feedback: (function(){ var el = document.querySelector('#jspsych-html-keyboard-response-stimulus'); if(!el) return false; var t = el.textContent.toLowerCase(); return t.includes('press') && t.includes('enter') && !document.querySelector('.stroop-stim'); })()

attention_check.response_js: (function(){ var el = document.querySelector('#jspsych-attention-check-rdoc-stimulus'); if(!el) return null; var t = el.textContent.toLowerCase(); if(t.includes('press the q key')) return 'q'; if(t.includes('press the p key')) return 'p'; if(t.includes('press the r key')) return 'r'; if(t.includes('press the s key')) return 's'; if(t.includes('press the t key')) return 't'; if(t.includes('press the j key')) return 'j'; if(t.includes('press the k key')) return 'k'; if(t.includes('press the e key')) return 'e'; if(t.includes('press the m key')) return 'm'; if(t.includes('press the i key')) return 'i'; if(t.includes('press the u key')) return 'u'; if(t.includes('first letter')) return 'a'; if(t.includes('second letter')) return 'b'; if(t.includes('third letter') && !t.includes('third to last')) return 'c'; if(t.includes('third to last')) return 'x'; if(t.includes('second to last')) return 'y'; if(t.includes('last letter')) return 'z'; return null; })()
